backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko canister declaring an empty actor.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, related files, components, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for all frontend components, sections, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-themed color variables, dark mode values, and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML template including metadata, Inter font, favicon, and root mount point for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app layout assembling navigation, sections, 3D dividers, and footer into a SPA structure.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section showing company description and four statistics cards using icon-based cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section with contact info cards and a form driven by a custom hook for submission handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: Section displaying six electronics categories with icons and descriptions in a responsive grid.
Renders a grid of product cards with ratings, pricing, and add-to-cart or quote actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Displays a hero banner with a 3D scene, marketing text, and buttons that smoothly scroll to page sections.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Provides the site footer with branding, navigation links, social icons, and a dynamic copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/site/TopNav.tsx: Implements a responsive top navigation bar with scroll-based styling and smooth section navigation.
frontend/src/components/three/HeroScene3: Creates an interactive 3D scene with a rotating sphere and particles, adapting complexity to performance settings.
frontend/src/components/three/SectionDiv: Renders a 3D particle wave divider or a fallback gradient based on device performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages creation and caching of a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, auto‑refetching dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides state and handlers for a contact form with basic validation, simulated submission, and auto‑reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, including login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for future React Query hooks when backend methods exist.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotionAndPe: Detects reduced‑motion preference and estimates device performance level to adapt UI behavior.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS base styles and a custom light/dark OKLCH color theme for the site.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then renders App.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom theme colors, typography, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Tracks project settings, requirements, features, and image needs for the Uttah Electronics website.
